policies.description: Aadhaar data processing requires explicit consent and must remain within MEITY-empaneled infrastructure. Unauthorized processing or cross-border transfer is prohibited.
policies.citation: Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023, Section 16 — Processing of personal data of children and persons with disability

policies.description: Financial transaction data processed by AI systems in the banking sector must remain within Indian jurisdiction. Cross-border AI processing of financial PII is prohibited without RBI approval.
policies.penalty: Regulatory action under RBI Act, potential license revocation
policies.citation: RBI Master Direction on IT Governance, Risk, Controls and Assurance Practices, 2023 + FREE-AI Framework August 2025

policies.description: Health records processed via AI must comply with ABDM data sharing protocols. Patient consent must be verifiable and granular. Flagged for manual review.
policies.penalty: Up to ₹250 crore under DPDP + ABDM deregistration
policies.citation: DPDP Act 2023 + Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission Health Data Management Policy

policies.description: Biometric data used in insurance AI applications must be processed on Indian soil with explicit policyholder consent. Cross-border biometric processing is prohibited.
policies.penalty: IRDAI regulatory penalty + potential license suspension
policies.citation: IRDAI (Protection of Policyholders' Interests) Regulations 2024, Data Residency Clause

policies.description: PAN card data is sensitive personal data. AI processing requires lawful purpose and explicit consent from the data principal.
policies.citation: DPDP Act 2023, Section 8 — Obligations of Data Fiduciary

policies.description: AI models making credit decisions must maintain explainability records and model inventories. Board-approved AI governance policies are mandatory.
policies.penalty: Regulatory directives under RBI FREE-AI Framework
policies.citation: RBI FREE-AI Framework, August 2025 — Recommendation 4: Model Inventory and Explainability

policies.description: High-risk AI deployments (credit scoring, healthcare diagnostics) require mandatory audits. Activity-based risk classification applies.
policies.penalty: Mandatory audit requirement — non-compliance may trigger enforcement under DPDP Act
policies.citation: MeitY AI Governance Guidelines, November 2025 — High-Risk AI Classification Framework
